/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/db_sensor_query.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libdb_sensor_query.so -o libdb_sensor_query.so CMakeFiles/db_sensor_query.dir/db_sensor_query_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/db_sensor_query.dir/db_sensor_query.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
